details: All queue operations are protected by lock
Lock acquisition has timeout to prevent deadlocks
All async operations wrapped in try/except
Worker crashes are caught and logged
Individual job failures don't stop worker
Worker task is created when queue has items
Worker exits when queue is empty
Worker state is cleaned up on crash

issues.issue: _emit_stage_update_non_blocking() uses asyncio.create_task() without tracking - tasks may be lost if event loop is busy
issues.fix: Track created tasks or use asyncio.ensure_future() with proper error handling

issues.issue: worker_done_callback creates task in callback (outside lock) - potential race condition

details: No direct .exists() calls on asset files
Directory checks are whitelisted in validate_no_asr_left.py
Process handling should be checked in plan.py or render scripts
Worker checks for done tasks and cleans up

recommendations.suggestion: Consider using a task tracker or ensure tasks are properly awaited
Use proper event loop scheduling for cleanup tasks
